cards.back: A project management approach that emphasizes flexibility, collaboration, and iterative progress toward well-defined goals.
A traditional project management approach that involves a linear and sequential process, with each phase building on the previous one.
A project management approach that combines elements of both Agile and Waterfall, allowing for a more flexible and iterative process while still maintaining a clear plan.
A framework for managing and completing complex projects using iterative and incremental practices, emphasizing teamwork, accountability, and continuous improvement.
A visual system for managing work, emphasizing continuous flow and limiting work in progress, to improve efficiency and reduce waste in software development projects.
